message:
🐛 Fix WebSocket resource leak in SaveResolutionDialog onopen handler (#10803)

Wrap ws.onopen body in try-catch so that if buildConversationSnippet()
or ws.send() throws, the WebSocket is properly closed and the promise
rejects immediately instead of hanging for 60s until timeout.

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
